iteration_history.changes: Initial optimized SKILL.md with complete Python scripts, explicit output formats, and step-by-step instructions tailored for devstral-small
iteration_history.notes: Station C scored 0.5 — model read CSV directly instead of running Python, missed some flood days

iteration_history.changes: Restructured skill with CRITICAL warning about CSV truncation, explicit 2-step workflow (write .py file then exec), removed theory and focused on actionable steps
iteration_history.notes: Both tasks score 100. Model correctly writes Python scripts and executes them via exec tool

key_optimization_insights: devstral-small tries to manually analyze CSV files instead of writing Python scripts when the task seems simple
openclaw's read tool truncates large files (~130 lines), causing the model to miss data points in long CSVs
Explicit CRITICAL warning about CSV truncation and mandatory write-then-exec workflow was the key fix
Providing complete copy-paste Python scripts in the skill ensures correct implementation
